zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey I de Lusignan於1145年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old39歲，母親Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay35歲。他和Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT至少有3個兒子。他去世於1224年5月在法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey I de Lusignan于1145年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南时，他的父亲Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old39岁，母亲Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay35岁。他和Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT至少有3个儿子。他去世于1224年5月在法国利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey I de Lusignan was born in 1145, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, was 39 and his mother, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, was 35. He had at least 3 sons with Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. He died in May 1224, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey I de Lusignan est né en 1145, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. Il est décédé en mai 1224, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey I de Lusignan 1145 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old 39 und seine Mutter Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay 35. Er hatte mit Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im Mai 1224 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I de Lusignan è nato il nel 1145 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. Morì nel maggio 1224, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I de Lusignanが1145年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Oldは39歳，母Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenayは35歳であった。彼はEustachie CHABOT-VOUVENTとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1224年5月にフランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I de Lusignan(이)가 1145년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1224년 5월 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 리모그스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I de Lusignan nasceu em 1145, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. Ele faleceu em maio de 1224, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey I de Lusignan родился в 1145 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. Он умер май 1224 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция в возрасте 79 лет.

sm.from 1191 to 1193: mai le 1191 e o'o I le 1193

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey I de Lusignan nació en 1145, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Eustachie CHABOT-VOUVENT. Murió en mayo de 1224, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, a la edad de 79 años.
